name: 3Gun Nation VR
short_description: A VR shooting Game with different MAPS and Firearms. You will learn to aim and shoot firearms in both the Real and the VR world. It is all done in the comfort and safety of your home.
detailed_description:
Roadmap

Shooters,

We are sorry to inform you that we will be retiring our product, 3GNVR, as part of our ongoing efforts to evolve and improve our offerings. We sincerely appreciate your support and trust in 3GNVR over the years. As we say goodbye to this product, we are excited to share that a new sport shooting project is in the works and will be launching later this year. Stay tuned for updates—we can’t wait to bring you something even better! Thank you for being part of our journey.

Best regards,
Team Bravo Limited


About the Game

Would like to learn handling real firearms in the real world? Want to improve your Aiming skills? 3GUN Nation VR is your answer!

3GUN Nation VR is a real shooting simulation, it allows you to experience what Speed/Competitive shooting is like without leaving the comfort of your home! The immersive experience is something I recommend every shooting enthusiast or someone who wants a break from the traditional FPS titles. With the uprising of VR shooting game, 3GUN Nation VR is the solution to bridge the gap between you being a Novice shooter and a Professional one.
3GUN Nation VR offers multiple Shooting stages for players battle for the quickest time across the globe and offering 3 kinds of firearms for players to use' shotgun, Rifle, Pistol'. 3GUN Nation VR allows the player to feel and experience what competitive shooting is and the skills needed to shoot in the real world without costing an arm and a leg. so if you are new to competitive shooting or want to increase your aim and shooting skills, this game is definitely on your wish list.


You will have access to 15+ stages in 6 packages are included in the first release. More stages will be added to the online database regularly. Feel free to throw us with stage ideas and we can incorporate into the game.

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Russian
*languages with full audio support
